controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present
controls.few_shot_policy: BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch with synthesis exact-label and evidence-support metric

hypothesis: BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch on the CoT Gan S0 path mirrors the direct ladder random-search arm and tests whether demo search still helps ChainOfThought on the same 25-record cap.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
The optimizer metric is stricter than benchmark scoring: bootstrapped traces must match the normalized gold label and provide exact source-quote support for all non-no-reference labels.
BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch compile cost scales with num_candidate_programs; treat compile time as a first-class ladder metric.
This capped validation config compares optimizers on the CoT single-pass path; it is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
